description: Centered authentication form with social login buttons, email/password inputs, and a remember-me checkbox on a full-bleed background image.

intent.summary: When the user asks for a login or sign-in page, refer to the AgnosticUI Login Form Playbook.

recipe.layout: Full-bleed background image. AgCard centered vertically and horizontally holds the logo, social login buttons, a labeled divider, email and password inputs, a remember-me checkbox, the primary submit button, and a forgot-password link.

components.role: Floating panel that groups all form controls
Social login (Google, Facebook) and primary submit action
Email address and password credential fields
Remember me opt-in below the password field
Visual separator between social and credential sections
Forgot password and create account navigation links

recipe.notes:
Social buttons come first, then a labeled AgDivider, then credential inputs. Example AgNode for the password field:
```json
{ "id": "pwd", "component": "AgInput", "props": { "type": "password", "label": "Password", "name": "password", "required": true } }
```
